Title: Build Your Website
Description: Welcome to your ultimate solution for professional, hassle-free website development and maintenance. With our Website Development as a Service (WDaaS), you get more than just a website; you get a dedicated digital partner committed to your online success. We handle all the technical complexities so you can focus on what you do best—running your business.
Features: Custom Website Design & Development: We'll create a stunning, responsive, and user-friendly website tailored to your brand and objectives.
SEO Optimization: We build your website with best practices for search engine optimization to help you rank higher and attract more organic traffic.
Website Hosting & Domain Management: Secure and reliable hosting, plus assistance with managing your domain name.
Regular Backups: Your data is safe with automated, frequent backups to prevent any loss.
Security Monitoring: Proactive monitoring and immediate response to potential security threats.
Performance Optimization: We ensure your website loads quickly and performs smoothly across all devices.
Ongoing Support & Consulting: Dedicated support for any questions or issues, along with strategic advice for your online presence.

PricingPlans.Name: Standard
Features: Premium hosting with faster loading speeds
Up to 3 hours of content updates/month

PricingPlans.Name: Premium
Features: In-depth SEO strategy and ongoing optimization
Daily security monitoring and real-time threat protection
Up to 6 hours of content updates/month

Title: UI Automation Training
Description: Elevate your team's quality assurance and development processes with our UI Automation Training as a Service. In today's fast-paced digital world, manual testing is a bottleneck. Our program is designed to empower individuals and teams with the skills to build, maintain, and run automated UI tests, ensuring your applications are always reliable and performant.
Features: Automate repetitive testing tasks, freeing up your team to focus on new features and more complex issues
Run comprehensive tests consistently and reliably, catching bugs early in the development cycle.
Shorten your release cycles by integrating automated testing into your continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipeline.
Gain practical, hands-on knowledge of how to create and manage robust UI automation suites using industry-standard tools and best practices

PricingPlans.Name: The Foundation
Features: One-on-one sessions to learn UI automation basics
Basic email support for technical questions.
1 hour of monthly support for any UI automation-related questions.

PricingPlans.Name: The Growth
Features: Group workshops to learn UI automation.
Creation of a basic UI automation framework
Up to 3 hours of monthly support for framework development and troubleshooting.

PricingPlans.Name: The Enterprise
Features: On-site training for UI automation for the entire team
Dedicated consultation and support for building a large-scale UI automation framework.
Up to 6 hours of monthly support for ongoing optimization and team mentoring.

Title: Website Maintenance as a Service
Description: Your website is a critical business asset, and its health, security, and performance are paramount. Our Website Maintenance as a Service ensures your site remains secure, fast, and up-to-date, allowing you to focus on your core business while we handle the technical upkeep.
Features: Security & Protection: Proactive monitoring and updates protect your site from vulnerabilities, malware, and cyber threats.
Performance Optimization: We ensure your website loads quickly and performs smoothly, which is crucial for user experience and search engine rankings.
Content & Functionality: We handle routine content updates, backups, and software patches to keep your site fresh and functional.
Reliable Support: We are your dedicated technical partner, ready to address issues and provide strategic advice.

PricingPlans.Name: The Growth
Features: Premium hosting with faster loading speeds
Up to 3 hours of monthly support

PricingPlans.Name: The Enterprise
Features: Daily security monitoring and real-time threat protection.
Up to 6 hours of monthly support
E-commerce functionality, CRM integration, and ongoing consulting.

Title: UI Regression Suite as a Service
Description: Ensure the stability and quality of your applications with our UI Regression Suite as a Service. We build and integrate a comprehensive, automated testing suite that runs after every code change, immediately flagging any bugs or unintended side effects. This proactive approach saves time, reduces risk, and guarantees a consistent user experience.
Features: Custom Mobile App Design & Development: Tailored solutions for iOS and Android platforms.
User Experience Focus: Intuitive design that enhances user engagement and satisfaction.
API Integration: Seamless integration with existing systems and third-party services.
App Store Deployment: Assistance with publishing your app on Google Play and Apple App Store.
Ongoing Maintenance & Support: Regular updates, bug fixes, and feature enhancements.

PricingPlans.Name: Standard
Features: Premium hosting with faster loading speeds
Up to 3 hours of monthly support

PricingPlans.Name: Premium
Features: In-depth API strategy and ongoing optimization
Daily security monitoring and real-time threat protection
Up to 6 hours of monthly support

Title: Build Your Mobile App
Description: Transform your business with our Mobile App Development as a Service (MADaaS). We specialize in creating high-quality, user-friendly mobile applications that enhance customer engagement and drive business growth. Whether you need a native app for iOS or Android, or a cross-platform solution, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life.
Features: Custom Mobile App Design & Development: Tailored solutions for iOS and Android platforms.
User Experience Focus: Intuitive design that enhances user engagement and satisfaction.
API Integration: Seamless integration with existing systems and third-party services.
App Store Deployment: Assistance with publishing your app on Google Play and Apple App Store.
Ongoing Maintenance & Support: Regular updates, bug fixes, and feature enhancements.

Features: Premium hosting with faster loading speeds
Up to 3 hours of monthly support

Features: In-depth API strategy and ongoing optimization
